description: Features: Tmode: Convert wired audio to BT signal and transmit it to BT device for output. It transmits audio streams from non-BT TV, home stereo system, or CD player to your BT headphones or speakers. Rmode: Receive BT signals and transmit it to wired audio via BT connection. It transmits audio streams from your BT-enabled phone, tablet, or computer to your wired stereo, speakers, or headphones. BT 5.0: Wireless 5.0 technology ensures transmitting strong signal in high quality and high speed. BT range reaches up to 10 meters in open space without obstacles.
